Create a transparent PNG sprite asset for a playable website map called Evan Web. Style: premium night-time 2D pixel art, top-down with slight isometric perspective, crisp hard pixel edges, 32px tile density, charcoal night palette, warm lantern gold, cyan monitor/broadcast light, restrained red beacons. Asset content: one cohesive Beijing broadcast district, no UI, no labels, no readable text, transparent background. Upper section has the Great Wall crossing dark mountain ridges. The Great Wall must visually connect downward into a fortified city wall, not directly into Tiananmen. The lower fortified city wall encloses Tiananmen Gate inside it: red walls, golden roof tiles, warm lanterns, wet stone plaza, ceremonial paving, small gates and corner towers. To the right of Tiananmen, leave visible breathing distance connected by the same plaza/road, then place the iconic CCTV Headquarters 'big pants' loop building silhouette, dark glass, cyan windows. Beside the CCTV building include a separate slim TV broadcast tower with red aircraft beacons and cyan signal lights. The whole district should feel like one continuous map object with shared pavement, wall geometry, lighting, and perspective, matching a moody pixel RPG map. Isolated sprite on transparent background, no photorealism, no 3D render, no flat vector, no watermark.
